metadata.title: Insert a New Line Within a Table Cell
metadata.description: Insert a New Line Within a Table Cell Localization & Tweaks

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Display the Enter key (↵) icon in the left sidebar ribbon
ast.target: 在左侧边栏功能区显示回车键 (↵) 图标

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Please restart Obsidian or reload the plugin for the ribbon icon change to take effect.
ast.target: 请重启 Obsidian 或重新加载插件以使功能区图标更改生效。

ast.name: text
ast.source: New Line Break Inside Table Cell Settings
ast.target: 表格单元格内换行设置

ast.name: text
ast.source:
This plugin inserts
tags for line breaks in table cells. Use the ribbon icon (if enabled) or the "New Line" command (Ctrl+P).
ast.target:
此插件在表格单元格中插入
标签以实现换行。使用功能区图标（如果已启用）或“新行”命令（Ctrl+P）。
